confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
about_description: Abdal 4iProto Panel is a comprehensive management interface for the Abdal 4iProto Server, providing full control over users, server configuration, traffic monitoring, and system logs.
name: Name
quote_text: Coding is an engaging and beloved hobby for me. I passionately and insatiably pursue knowledge in cybersecurity and programming.
panel_port_description: Port number for the panel web interface
logging_description: Enable logging of panel events and errors
max_login_attempts_description: Maximum number of failed login attempts before blocking
login_attempt_window_description: Time window in seconds for counting login attempts
block_duration_description: Duration in seconds that an IP remains blocked after exceeding max attempts
config_saved_success: Configuration saved successfully. Panel service will restart...
confirm_remove_ip: Are you sure you want to remove {ip}?
confirm_restart_server: Are you sure you want to restart the server service?
confirm_restart_panel: Are you sure you want to restart the panel service? The panel will be unavailable for a few seconds.
panel_restart_success: Panel service restart initiated. The page will reload in a few seconds...
theme_description: Select the color theme for the panel
telegram_enabled_description: Run the Telegram bot using long polling when the panel starts
telegram_token_description: Token obtained from BotFather (kept private, never exposed to non-admins)
telegram_admins_description: Numeric Telegram user IDs allowed to control the panel. Separate with commas, spaces or new lines.
tg_welcome: ✅ Welcome! The panel control bot is ready. Use /menu to open the main menu.
tg_menu_help_hint: Pick an option below or send /help to see all commands.
tg_confirm_delete_user: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
tg_ask_username: Send the username (or 'auto' to generate one).
tg_ask_password: Send the password (or 'auto' to generate one).
tg_ask_blocked_domains: Send comma-separated blocked domains (or 'skip' for none).
tg_ask_blocked_ips: Send comma-separated blocked IPs (or 'skip' for none).
tg_ask_max_sessions: Send the maximum simultaneous sessions allowed (positive integer).
tg_ask_session_ttl: Send the session TTL in seconds (positive integer).
tg_ask_max_speed: Send the maximum speed in KB/s (positive integer).
tg_ask_max_total: Send the maximum total traffic in MB (0 means unlimited).
tg_ask_shell: Send the shell path, e.g. /bin/bash or cmd.exe.
tg_ask_max_auth: Send the maximum auth attempts (positive integer).
tg_ask_private_key: Send the private key file path.
tg_ask_public_key: Send the public key file path.
tg_ask_ip: Send the IP address to block.
tg_err_ports_empty: At least one port is required.
tg_err_ip_not_found: IP not found in the blocked list.
tg_err_flow_lost: Could not resume the previous flow. Returning to the menu.
tg_ip_added: IP added to the blocked list.
tg_ip_removed: IP removed from the blocked list.
tg_blocked_access_empty: No blocked access log files found.
tg_no_traffic_for_user: No traffic data for this user.
tg_confirm_delete_session: Are you sure you want to delete this session?
tg_session_deleting: Deleting the session, this may take a few seconds...
tg_confirm_restart_server: Restart the Abdal 4iProto Server service now?
tg_confirm_restart_panel: Restart the panel service? The bot connection will drop briefly.
tg_use_menu_hint: Use /menu to open the main menu.
tg_help_start: Start the bot and pick a language
tg_help_adduser: Create a user with default values
tg_help_adduser_interactive: Create a user step by step
tg_help_server: View or edit the server configuration
